a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Primary school completion rates, adjusted gender parity index, 2024

An
adjusted gender parity index
of 1 indicates equal
primary
school completion rates between boys and girls.
Values below 1 favor boys, and above 1 favor girls.
Data source: UNESCO Institute for Statistics (2024)
